titleStmt.title: SII 36.323: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 323. (A.R. No. 323 of 1910.) TIRUMEYÑĀNAM, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Jñānaparamēśvara temple.

summary.p: Damaged and incomplete. Seems to record a sale of land by the assembly of Vāṉavaṉmādēvich-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Chēṟṟūrk-kūṟṟam, a subdivision of Kulōttuṅga-Chōḻa-vaḷanāḍu for instituting a temple garden. Mentions a land transaction made during the 41st year of the king and the temple of Samparīśvaramuḍaiyar. Lands belonging to the village goddess (ūr piḍāri) and potter (vēṭkōvaṉ) and an irrigation channel, Olōgamādēvavāyakkāl are mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvanac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī kulottuṅkacoḻadevarkku yāṇṭu 4 10 3 vatu miruccika nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu tacemiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa tti nāḷ kulottuṅkacoḻa vaḷanāṭṭu ceṟṟūrk kūṟṟattu vāṉavaṉ mātevic caruppeti maṅkalattu Irukkum veṭkovaṉ mahādevar nilattukku vaṭakku Ūrppiṭāriyār nilattukkun tirunantavanattukkum kiḻakkum Ittevar koṇṭa nilattukku teṟkkum Āka naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam mā mukkāṇikkīḻaraiyilk kiḻakkaṭaiya nanta
vanappuṟamākavum Ivvūr sabhaiyār pakkal yāṇṭu nāṟpattoṉṟāvatu nāṉ koṇṭa vilaisrāvaṇappaṭiyum Iṟaiiḻiccāvaṇappaṭi Ik koyilile kalveṭṭuvitta paricāvatu Ivvūr nālāṅ kaṇṭattu Olokamahādevi vākkālukku meṟkkum campariśvaramuṭaiya meṟpaṭiyār pakkal Aiñcu kāciṭṭu śāśvatikam cantirātitta valiṟaiiliyāka Iṟaiiḻiccivittuk koṇṭu Innilam Iraṇṭu mā mukkāṇik kīḻaraiyum Itil taviṟak koṇṭu Iṟaiiḻicci Ippaṭi niman=ta
paṇṇikaip paṭikkum tiruvamutupaṭikku nila mākāṇik kīḻk kāṇiyaraikkālum nīkki meṟkaṭaiya nān paṇṇuvittu varukiṟa tillaināyakaṉ tirunantavanattukku tirunan=tavaṉappuṟamāka nilam Oru māvaraikāṇi Araikkālum Āka Innilattu sabhaiyār pakkal Oru kku vilai koṇṭu yaṉ śirāmatiruvaṉaraṭikaḷ paṭṭarum kavuṇiyaṉ keśavaṉ tan kavuṇiyaṉ kku pālaikūttaṉ vāmanapaṭṭarum paṇi
ṅkaṭaṉ paṭṭarum tillaināyakapaṭṭarum sabhaiyuḷḷiruntu paṇitta kūṭṭapperumakkaḷ veṇṇai kūttapaṭṭarum kavuṇiyaṉ tta paṭṭarum Uḷḷiṭṭa
Digital edition of SII 36.323 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
